name: rust-ai-devcontainer
postCreateCommand: bash -i -c 'rustup component add clippy rustfmt && curl -sS https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py | python3 && python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip modal && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash && CODEX_VERSION=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/openai/codex/releases/latest | grep tag_name | cut -d\" -f4) && curl -fsSL https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/download/${CODEX_VERSION}/codex-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz | tar -xz && mv codex-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl ~/.local/bin/codex && chmod +x ~/.local/bin/codex && echo export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH >> ~/.bashrc && echo export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH >> ~/.profile'
